summary: Integrate Meta-KB into ModelRouter selection pipeline. Added meta-KB advice query after Skill-RL but before scoring. Transforms anti-pattern advice into model penalties (high=-0.3, medium=-0.15, low=-0.05).
root_cause: getLearningAdvice method existed but was never called in the routing pipeline
fix_approach: Added meta-KB penalty lookup after Skill-RL boost, applied during model scoring. Updated getLearningAdvice to transform raw advice into modelPenalties format.

validation.notes: Model router tests pass. Full suite shows pre-existing learning-gate.mjs issue.
